---
title: "04: Combined Cohort Analysis"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

## Load Libraries and Data

```{r load_data}
library(data.table)
library(MatchIt)
library(gt)
library(sandwich)
library(lmtest)
library(stringr)

data_path <- "Z:/Kucirek/"
output_path <- "C:/Users/dkucirek/Documents/Derm-SRP/"
tables_dir <- file.path(output_path, "tables")
csv_dir <- file.path(output_path, "csv")

if (!dir.exists(tables_dir)) dir.create(tables_dir, recursive = TRUE)
if (!dir.exists(csv_dir)) dir.create(csv_dir, recursive = TRUE)

format_p <- function(p) {
  if (is.na(p)) return("NA")
  if (p < 0.001) return("<0.001")
  sprintf("%.3f", p)
}

result_wide <- readRDS(file.path(data_path, "result_wide.rds"))
patient_data <- readRDS(file.path(data_path, "patient_data_for_matching.rds"))

setDT(result_wide)
setDT(patient_data)
```

## Prep: Build Columns Expected by Downstream Analysis

```{r prep}
# Encounter-level any-clinical-depression flag (PHQ-9 >= 10).
# Severity strata (mild/moderate/mod-severe/severe) are NOT created at encounter
# level — they get assigned at patient level in the outcomes chunk based on
# each patient's worst score (per Methods).
result_wide[, phq_any_clinical_depression := !is.na(phq_score) & phq_score >= 10]

# Suicidal ideation from PHQ-9 Item 9 (>= 1 = endorsed)
si_col <- grep("thoughts.*dead|thoughts.*hurting", names(result_wide),
               value = TRUE, ignore.case = TRUE)
if (length(si_col) > 0) {
  result_wide[, phq_si := !is.na(get(si_col[1])) & as.numeric(get(si_col[1])) >= 1]
} else {
  result_wide[, phq_si := FALSE]
  warning("No SI column found")
}

cat("Prep complete\n")
cat("  phq_si:", sum(result_wide$phq_si, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
cat("  Race/ethnicity by group:\n")
print(table(patient_data$race_ethnicity_combined, patient_data$is_chronic_derm))

cat("\nData loaded\n")
cat("Chronic derm:", sum(patient_data$is_chronic_derm), "\n")
cat("Controls:", sum(!patient_data$is_chronic_derm), "\n")
```

## Propensity Score Matching

```{r matching}
set.seed(42)

match_df <- as.data.frame(patient_data)
match_df$treat <- as.numeric(match_df$is_chronic_derm)

m_out <- matchit(
  treat ~ age_at_encounter + sex + race_ethnicity_combined + fin_class + has_psych_condition,
  data = match_df,
  method = "nearest",
  distance = "glm",
  caliper = 0.2,
  replace = FALSE,
  ratio = 20
)

matched_data <- match.data(m_out)
setDT(matched_data)

matched_data[, is_chronic_derm := treat == 1]

cat("\n=== Matching Results ===\n")
cat("Chronic derm:", sum(matched_data$is_chronic_derm), "\n")
cat("Controls:", sum(!matched_data$is_chronic_derm), "\n")

bal <- summary(m_out)$sum.matched[, "Std. Mean Diff."]
cat("Max SMD:", round(max(abs(bal)), 3), "\n")
cat("Per-variable SMDs (matched cohort):\n")
print(round(bal, 4))

# Save SMDs to CSV for reproducibility
fwrite(data.table(Variable = names(bal), SMD = round(as.numeric(bal), 4)),
       file.path(csv_dir, "Per_Variable_SMDs.csv"))

saveRDS(matched_data, file.path(data_path, "matched_data.rds"))
```

## Patient-Level Outcomes

```{r outcomes}
matched_mrns <- unique(matched_data$mrn_deid)

phq_data <- result_wide[mrn_deid %in% matched_mrns]
phq_data <- merge(phq_data, matched_data[, .(mrn_deid, is_chronic_derm)], by = "mrn_deid")

# Patient-level aggregation — keep max score, any-clinical-depression, and SI
patient_outcomes <- phq_data[, .(
  max_phq                 = max(phq_score, na.rm = TRUE),
  any_clinical_depression = any(phq_any_clinical_depression, na.rm = TRUE),
  si                      = any(phq_si, na.rm = TRUE)
), by = .(mrn_deid, is_chronic_derm)]

patient_outcomes[is.infinite(max_phq), max_phq := NA]

# Assign mutually exclusive severity strata based on each patient's WORST PHQ score
# (per Methods: "the highest recorded PHQ score was used to describe their symptom severity")
patient_outcomes[, `:=`(
  mild       = !is.na(max_phq) & max_phq >= 5  & max_phq < 10,
  moderate   = !is.na(max_phq) & max_phq >= 10 & max_phq < 15,
  mod_severe = !is.na(max_phq) & max_phq >= 15 & max_phq < 20,
  severe     = !is.na(max_phq) & max_phq >= 20
)]

cat("\nPatients with outcomes:", nrow(patient_outcomes), "\n")
cat("\nSeverity breakdown by group (sanity check):\n")
print(patient_outcomes[, .(
  mild         = sum(mild),
  moderate     = sum(moderate),
  mod_severe   = sum(mod_severe),
  severe       = sum(severe),
  any_clinical = sum(any_clinical_depression),
  si           = sum(si)
), by = is_chronic_derm])
```

## Main Analyses (Modified Poisson Risk Ratios)

```{r main_analyses}
get_rr <- function(outcome_var, title) {
  # Build the regression frame
  reg_data <- patient_outcomes[, .(
    outcome_num = as.numeric(get(outcome_var)),
    group = as.numeric(is_chronic_derm)
  )]

  # Modified Poisson with robust SE for risk ratio
  model <- glm(outcome_num ~ group, family = poisson(link = "log"), data = reg_data)
  robust <- coeftest(model, vcov = sandwich)

  log_rr <- robust[2, "Estimate"]
  se     <- robust[2, "Std. Error"]
  rr     <- exp(log_rr)
  ci_lo  <- exp(log_rr - 1.96 * se)
  ci_hi  <- exp(log_rr + 1.96 * se)
  p      <- robust[2, "Pr(>|z|)"]

  # Cell counts for display
  n00 <- patient_outcomes[is_chronic_derm == FALSE & get(outcome_var) == FALSE, .N]
  n01 <- patient_outcomes[is_chronic_derm == FALSE & get(outcome_var) == TRUE,  .N]
  n10 <- patient_outcomes[is_chronic_derm == TRUE  & get(outcome_var) == FALSE, .N]
  n11 <- patient_outcomes[is_chronic_derm == TRUE  & get(outcome_var) == TRUE,  .N]
  tbl <- matrix(c(n00, n01, n10, n11), nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE,
                dimnames = list(c("Control", "Chronic"), c("No", "Yes")))

  cat("\n", title, "\n")
  print(tbl)
  cat("RR:", round(rr, 2),
      "(95% CI:", round(ci_lo, 2), "-", round(ci_hi, 2), ")\n")
  cat("P:", format_p(p), "\n")

  list(table = tbl, rr = c(rr, ci_lo, ci_hi), p = p)
}

# Mutually exclusive severity strata (patient-level, by worst score)
mild_res         <- get_rr("mild",       "Mild (PHQ 5-9)")
moderate_res     <- get_rr("moderate",   "Moderate (PHQ 10-14)")
mod_severe_res   <- get_rr("mod_severe", "Moderately Severe (PHQ 15-19)")
severe_res       <- get_rr("severe",     "Severe (PHQ 20-27)")

# Any clinical depression (PHQ-9 >= 10)
any_clinical_res <- get_rr("any_clinical_depression", "Any Clinical Depression (PHQ-9 >= 10)")

# Safety outcome
si_res           <- get_rr("si", "Suicidal Ideation (Item 9 > 0)")
```

## Sensitivity Analyses

```{r sensitivity}
cat("\n========================================\n")
cat("SENSITIVITY ANALYSES\n")
cat("========================================\n")

# 1. Continuous PHQ
cat("\n--- Continuous PHQ-9 ---\n")
cont_data <- patient_outcomes[!is.na(max_phq)]

chronic_phq <- cont_data[is_chronic_derm == TRUE, max_phq]
control_phq <- cont_data[is_chronic_derm == FALSE, max_phq]

cat("Chronic: Mean =", round(mean(chronic_phq), 2), "SD =", round(sd(chronic_phq), 2), "\n")
cat("Control: Mean =", round(mean(control_phq), 2), "SD =", round(sd(control_phq), 2), "\n")

cont_data[, group := as.numeric(is_chronic_derm)]
lm_fit <- lm(max_phq ~ group, data = cont_data)
robust_se <- coeftest(lm_fit, vcov = vcovHC(lm_fit, type = "HC1"))

mean_diff <- robust_se["group", "Estimate"]
se_diff <- robust_se["group", "Std. Error"]
p_cont <- robust_se["group", "Pr(>|t|)"]

cat("Mean Diff:", round(mean_diff, 2),
    "(95% CI:", round(mean_diff - 1.96*se_diff, 2), "to", round(mean_diff + 1.96*se_diff, 2), ")\n")
cat("P:", format_p(p_cont), "\n")

# 2. E-Values for significant findings
cat("\n--- E-Values ---\n")

calc_evalue <- function(rr, ci_lo) {
  if (is.na(rr) || rr <= 1) return(c(NA, NA))
  ev_pt <- rr + sqrt(rr * (rr - 1))
  ev_ci <- if (!is.na(ci_lo) && ci_lo > 1) ci_lo + sqrt(ci_lo * (ci_lo - 1)) else 1
  round(c(ev_pt, ev_ci), 2)
}

ev_mild         <- calc_evalue(mild_res$rr[1],         mild_res$rr[2])
ev_moderate     <- calc_evalue(moderate_res$rr[1],     moderate_res$rr[2])
ev_mod_severe   <- calc_evalue(mod_severe_res$rr[1],   mod_severe_res$rr[2])
ev_severe       <- calc_evalue(severe_res$rr[1],       severe_res$rr[2])
ev_any_clinical <- calc_evalue(any_clinical_res$rr[1], any_clinical_res$rr[2])
ev_si           <- calc_evalue(si_res$rr[1],           si_res$rr[2])

cat("Mild (5-9):       RR =", round(mild_res$rr[1], 2),         "E-value =", ev_mild[1], "\n")
cat("Moderate (10-14): RR =", round(moderate_res$rr[1], 2),     "E-value =", ev_moderate[1], "\n")
cat("Mod-Severe (15-19): RR =", round(mod_severe_res$rr[1], 2), "E-value =", ev_mod_severe[1], "\n")
cat("Severe (20-27):   RR =", round(severe_res$rr[1], 2),       "E-value =", ev_severe[1], "\n")
cat("Any Clinical:     RR =", round(any_clinical_res$rr[1], 2), "E-value =", ev_any_clinical[1], "\n")
cat("Suicidal Ideation: RR =", round(si_res$rr[1], 2),          "E-value =", ev_si[1], "\n")
```

## Prior Psychiatric History (Manuscript "Behavioral Health Visit" Claim)

```{r bh_visits}
# Per manuscript Discussion: "only 3% (n=154) of the dermatology cohort had
# recorded behavioral health visits within the three-year study period, less
# than half of those with clinical depression symptoms."
#
# This corresponds to the `has_psych_condition` flag built in File 02:
# psychiatric/behavioral-health visit BEFORE the index dermatologic encounter
# (i.e., prior psych history). This same flag is used as a matching covariate.
#
# This chunk reports two views:
#   1. has_psych_condition in the full matched cohort (chronic derm vs control)
#   2. has_psych_condition AMONG patients with PHQ-9 >=10 (clinical depression)

cat("\n========================================\n")
cat("PRIOR PSYCHIATRIC HISTORY\n")
cat("========================================\n")

# Bring has_psych_condition from matched_data into patient-level frame
prior_psych_data <- merge(
  patient_outcomes[, .(mrn_deid, is_chronic_derm, any_clinical_depression)],
  matched_data[, .(mrn_deid, has_psych_condition)],
  by = "mrn_deid"
)

# Coerce factor TRUE/FALSE to logical for arithmetic
prior_psych_data[, has_psych := as.logical(has_psych_condition == TRUE | has_psych_condition == "TRUE")]

# ---- Part 1: Prior psych in the FULL matched cohort ----
cat("\n--- Prior psych history in full matched cohort ---\n")
prior_all <- prior_psych_data[, .(
  n_total       = .N,
  n_prior_psych = sum(has_psych),
  pct           = round(mean(has_psych) * 100, 1)
), by = is_chronic_derm]
print(as.data.frame(prior_all))

# ---- Part 2: Prior psych among PHQ-9 >= 10 patients ----
cat("\n--- Prior psych history among PHQ-9 >=10 ---\n")
prior_phq10 <- prior_psych_data[any_clinical_depression == TRUE, .(
  n_phq10       = .N,
  n_prior_psych = sum(has_psych),
  pct           = round(mean(has_psych) * 100, 1)
), by = is_chronic_derm]
print(as.data.frame(prior_phq10))

# 2x2 + chi-square test for the proportion difference (PHQ-9 >=10 subset)
phq10_data <- prior_psych_data[any_clinical_depression == TRUE]
prior_tab <- with(phq10_data, table(is_chronic_derm, has_psych))
cat("\n2x2 table (rows = is_chronic_derm, cols = has_psych) among PHQ-9 >=10:\n")
print(prior_tab)

prior_chi <- chisq.test(prior_tab)
cat("\nChi-square test for proportion difference (PHQ-9 >=10 subset): P =",
    format_p(prior_chi$p.value), "\n")

# Risk ratio for prior psych (chronic derm vs control), modified Poisson, PHQ-9 >=10 subset
phq10_data[, prior_num := as.numeric(has_psych)]
phq10_data[, group := as.numeric(is_chronic_derm)]
prior_model <- glm(prior_num ~ group, family = poisson(link = "log"), data = phq10_data)
prior_robust <- coeftest(prior_model, vcov = sandwich)
prior_est <- prior_robust["group", "Estimate"]
prior_se  <- prior_robust["group", "Std. Error"]
prior_rr  <- exp(prior_est)
prior_lo  <- exp(prior_est - 1.96*prior_se)
prior_hi  <- exp(prior_est + 1.96*prior_se)
cat("\nRisk ratio (chronic vs control), prior psych among PHQ-9 >=10: ",
    sprintf("%.2f (95%% CI: %.2f-%.2f), P = %s\n",
            prior_rr, prior_lo, prior_hi, format_p(prior_robust["group", "Pr(>|z|)"])))

# Save (both full-cohort and PHQ>=10 subset)
prior_output <- rbind(
  data.table(
    Subset = "Full matched cohort",
    Group = c("Control", "Chronic Derm"),
    N_Total = c(prior_all[is_chronic_derm == FALSE, n_total],
                prior_all[is_chronic_derm == TRUE,  n_total]),
    N_Prior_Psych = c(prior_all[is_chronic_derm == FALSE, n_prior_psych],
                      prior_all[is_chronic_derm == TRUE,  n_prior_psych]),
    Pct_Prior_Psych = c(prior_all[is_chronic_derm == FALSE, pct],
                        prior_all[is_chronic_derm == TRUE,  pct])
  ),
  data.table(
    Subset = "PHQ-9 >=10",
    Group = c("Control", "Chronic Derm"),
    N_Total = c(prior_phq10[is_chronic_derm == FALSE, n_phq10],
                prior_phq10[is_chronic_derm == TRUE,  n_phq10]),
    N_Prior_Psych = c(prior_phq10[is_chronic_derm == FALSE, n_prior_psych],
                      prior_phq10[is_chronic_derm == TRUE,  n_prior_psych]),
    Pct_Prior_Psych = c(prior_phq10[is_chronic_derm == FALSE, pct],
                        prior_phq10[is_chronic_derm == TRUE,  pct])
  )
)
fwrite(prior_output, file.path(csv_dir, "Prior_Psych_History.csv"))
cat("\nSaved:", file.path(csv_dir, "Prior_Psych_History.csv"), "\n")
```

## Interaction Analyses

```{r interactions}
# Per Methods: "Poisson regression with interaction terms was used for
# interaction analyses between depression symptoms, race and sex."
#
# Models fit on the matched cohort. Outcome = any clinical depression (PHQ-9
# >= 10) at the patient level. Modified Poisson with sandwich SE.
#
# Reports per-level interaction term P values, the joint LR test for each
# interaction (across all levels of the categorical modifier), and stratified
# RRs within each subgroup. Outputs saved to CSV.

cat("\n========================================\n")
cat("INTERACTION ANALYSES\n")
cat("========================================\n")

# Re-attach matching covariates to patient_outcomes
interaction_data <- merge(
  patient_outcomes,
  matched_data[, .(mrn_deid, age_at_encounter, sex, race_ethnicity_combined,
                   fin_class, has_psych_condition)],
  by = "mrn_deid"
)

# Drop sex == "Unknown" and clean factor levels
interaction_data <- interaction_data[sex != "Unknown" & !is.na(race_ethnicity_combined)]
interaction_data[, sex := droplevels(factor(sex))]
interaction_data[, race_ethnicity_combined := droplevels(factor(race_ethnicity_combined))]
interaction_data[, fin_class := droplevels(factor(fin_class))]
interaction_data[, any_clinical_num := as.numeric(any_clinical_depression)]
interaction_data[, group := as.numeric(is_chronic_derm)]

cat("Analysis sample:", nrow(interaction_data), "patients\n")
cat("  Chronic derm:", sum(interaction_data$is_chronic_derm), "\n")
cat("  Controls:    ", sum(!interaction_data$is_chronic_derm), "\n\n")

# ----- Race/ethnicity x chronic_derm -----
cat("--- RACE/ETHNICITY x CHRONIC_DERM ---\n")

race_int_model <- glm(
  any_clinical_num ~ group * race_ethnicity_combined +
                     age_at_encounter + sex + fin_class + has_psych_condition,
  family = poisson(link = "log"),
  data = interaction_data
)

race_int_robust <- coeftest(race_int_model, vcov = sandwich)
race_int_terms <- grep("^group:race_ethnicity_combined", rownames(race_int_robust), value = TRUE)

cat("Per-level interaction term P values:\n")
for (t in race_int_terms) {
  cat("  ", t, ": Estimate =", round(race_int_robust[t, "Estimate"], 3),
      ", P =", format_p(race_int_robust[t, "Pr(>|z|)"]), "\n")
}

# Joint LR test against no-interaction model
race_main_model <- glm(
  any_clinical_num ~ group + race_ethnicity_combined +
                     age_at_encounter + sex + fin_class + has_psych_condition,
  family = poisson(link = "log"),
  data = interaction_data
)
race_lr <- anova(race_main_model, race_int_model, test = "Chisq")
race_joint_p <- race_lr$`Pr(>Chi)`[2]
cat("\nJoint LR test (race x group):  P =", format_p(race_joint_p), "\n\n")

# Stratified RRs by race
cat("Stratified RRs (chronic vs control), by race/ethnicity:\n")
race_strat_rows <- list()
for (lvl in levels(interaction_data$race_ethnicity_combined)) {
  sub <- interaction_data[race_ethnicity_combined == lvl]
  if (sum(sub$group == 1) < 10 || sum(sub$group == 0) < 10) {
    cat("  ", lvl, ": n too small, skipped\n")
    next
  }
  m  <- glm(any_clinical_num ~ group, family = poisson(link = "log"), data = sub)
  rb <- coeftest(m, vcov = sandwich)
  est <- rb["group", "Estimate"]
  se  <- rb["group", "Std. Error"]
  pv  <- rb["group", "Pr(>|z|)"]
  rr  <- exp(est)
  lo  <- exp(est - 1.96*se)
  hi  <- exp(est + 1.96*se)
  cat(sprintf("  %-22s  RR = %.2f (95%% CI: %.2f-%.2f), P = %s   [n_case=%d, n_ctrl=%d]\n",
              lvl, rr, lo, hi, format_p(pv),
              sum(sub$group == 1), sum(sub$group == 0)))
  race_strat_rows[[lvl]] <- data.table(
    Modifier = "Race/Ethnicity", Level = lvl,
    N_Case = sum(sub$group == 1), N_Ctrl = sum(sub$group == 0),
    RR = round(rr, 2), CI_lo = round(lo, 2), CI_hi = round(hi, 2),
    P = pv
  )
}

# ----- Sex x chronic_derm -----
cat("\n--- SEX x CHRONIC_DERM ---\n")

sex_int_model <- glm(
  any_clinical_num ~ group * sex +
                     age_at_encounter + race_ethnicity_combined + fin_class + has_psych_condition,
  family = poisson(link = "log"),
  data = interaction_data
)

sex_int_robust <- coeftest(sex_int_model, vcov = sandwich)
sex_int_terms <- grep("^group:sex", rownames(sex_int_robust), value = TRUE)

cat("Per-level interaction term P values:\n")
for (t in sex_int_terms) {
  cat("  ", t, ": Estimate =", round(sex_int_robust[t, "Estimate"], 3),
      ", P =", format_p(sex_int_robust[t, "Pr(>|z|)"]), "\n")
}

sex_main_model <- glm(
  any_clinical_num ~ group + sex +
                     age_at_encounter + race_ethnicity_combined + fin_class + has_psych_condition,
  family = poisson(link = "log"),
  data = interaction_data
)
sex_lr <- anova(sex_main_model, sex_int_model, test = "Chisq")
sex_joint_p <- sex_lr$`Pr(>Chi)`[2]
cat("\nJoint LR test (sex x group):  P =", format_p(sex_joint_p), "\n\n")

# Stratified RRs by sex
cat("Stratified RRs (chronic vs control), by sex:\n")
sex_strat_rows <- list()
for (lvl in levels(interaction_data$sex)) {
  sub <- interaction_data[sex == lvl]
  if (sum(sub$group == 1) < 10 || sum(sub$group == 0) < 10) {
    cat("  ", lvl, ": n too small, skipped\n")
    next
  }
  m  <- glm(any_clinical_num ~ group, family = poisson(link = "log"), data = sub)
  rb <- coeftest(m, vcov = sandwich)
  est <- rb["group", "Estimate"]
  se  <- rb["group", "Std. Error"]
  pv  <- rb["group", "Pr(>|z|)"]
  rr  <- exp(est)
  lo  <- exp(est - 1.96*se)
  hi  <- exp(est + 1.96*se)
  cat(sprintf("  %-10s  RR = %.2f (95%% CI: %.2f-%.2f), P = %s   [n_case=%d, n_ctrl=%d]\n",
              lvl, rr, lo, hi, format_p(pv),
              sum(sub$group == 1), sum(sub$group == 0)))
  sex_strat_rows[[lvl]] <- data.table(
    Modifier = "Sex", Level = lvl,
    N_Case = sum(sub$group == 1), N_Ctrl = sum(sub$group == 0),
    RR = round(rr, 2), CI_lo = round(lo, 2), CI_hi = round(hi, 2),
    P = pv
  )
}

# ----- Save -----
interaction_summary <- data.table(
  Modifier = c("Race/Ethnicity", "Sex"),
  Joint_P_Value = c(format_p(race_joint_p), format_p(sex_joint_p))
)
fwrite(interaction_summary, file.path(csv_dir, "Interaction_Tests.csv"))

stratified_rrs <- rbindlist(c(race_strat_rows, sex_strat_rows))
fwrite(stratified_rrs, file.path(csv_dir, "Stratified_RRs_By_Subgroup.csv"))

cat("\nSaved:\n")
cat("  ", file.path(csv_dir, "Interaction_Tests.csv"), "\n")
cat("  ", file.path(csv_dir, "Stratified_RRs_By_Subgroup.csv"), "\n")
```

## Summary Table

```{r summary_table}
summary_results <- data.table(
  Analysis = c("Mild (PHQ 5-9)", "Moderate (PHQ 10-14)",
               "Moderately Severe (PHQ 15-19)", "Severe (PHQ 20-27)",
               "Any Clinical Depression (PHQ >= 10)", "Suicidal Ideation",
               "Continuous PHQ"),
  Measure = c("RR", "RR", "RR", "RR", "RR", "RR", "Mean Diff"),
  Estimate = round(c(mild_res$rr[1], moderate_res$rr[1], mod_severe_res$rr[1],
                     severe_res$rr[1], any_clinical_res$rr[1], si_res$rr[1], mean_diff), 2),
  CI_Lower = round(c(mild_res$rr[2], moderate_res$rr[2], mod_severe_res$rr[2],
                     severe_res$rr[2], any_clinical_res$rr[2], si_res$rr[2],
                     mean_diff - 1.96*se_diff), 2),
  CI_Upper = round(c(mild_res$rr[3], moderate_res$rr[3], mod_severe_res$rr[3],
                     severe_res$rr[3], any_clinical_res$rr[3], si_res$rr[3],
                     mean_diff + 1.96*se_diff), 2),
  P = c(format_p(mild_res$p), format_p(moderate_res$p), format_p(mod_severe_res$p),
        format_p(severe_res$p), format_p(any_clinical_res$p), format_p(si_res$p),
        format_p(p_cont)),
  E_Value_Point = c(ev_mild[1], ev_moderate[1], ev_mod_severe[1], ev_severe[1],
              ev_any_clinical[1], ev_si[1], NA),
  E_Value_CI = c(ev_mild[2], ev_moderate[2], ev_mod_severe[2], ev_severe[2],
              ev_any_clinical[2], ev_si[2], NA)
)

# Create CI column
summary_results[, CI := paste0("(", CI_Lower, ", ", CI_Upper, ")")]

# Select columns for display
display_cols <- summary_results[, .(Analysis, Measure, Estimate, CI, P, E_Value_Point, E_Value_CI)]

# Build gt table
summary_gt <- gt(display_cols)
summary_gt <- tab_header(summary_gt,
                         title = "Combined Cohort: Depression Severity",
                         subtitle = "Chronic Dermatologic Conditions vs Matched Controls (Modified Poisson Risk Ratios)")
summary_gt <- cols_label(summary_gt,
                         Analysis = "PHQ-9 Category", Measure = "Measure",
                         Estimate = "Estimate", CI = "95% CI", P = "P",
                         E_Value_Point = "E-Value (Point)",
                         E_Value_CI = "E-Value (CI)")
summary_gt <- tab_options(summary_gt, table.font.size = px(11), column_labels.font.weight = "bold")
summary_gt <- tab_footnote(summary_gt,
                           "Severity strata are mutually exclusive at the patient level, assigned by worst PHQ-9 score. RRs estimated via modified Poisson regression with robust (sandwich) variance. E-values show minimum confounder strength to explain away association (Point) or shift the lower CI bound to the null (CI).",
                           locations = cells_column_labels(columns = E_Value_Point))

print(summary_gt)

# PNG save disabled — Chrome not available on WinStats
# gtsave(summary_gt, file.path(tables_dir, "Combined_Cohort_Severity.png"))

fwrite(summary_results, file.path(csv_dir, "Combined_Cohort_Severity.csv"))

cat("\n=== FILE 04 COMPLETE ===\n")
cat("CSV saved to:", file.path(csv_dir, "Combined_Cohort_Severity.csv"), "\n")
```
